creator: Josephine Armistead
description: Out of the technological centres of the world has come a new, strange variant of fascism–namely, neo-reaction, or “NRx”. I shall here provide a critique of this ideology and an attempt at understanding of its origins, its tactics, and how it may be defeated.
subject: antifa

title: The Silicon Ideology
